SEARCH
Package be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event

Class MisdesignAdapter

java.lang.Object
be.belegkarnil.game.board.tak.event.MisdesignAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
MisdesignListener, EventListener
public class MisdesignAdapter extends Object implements MisdesignListener
An abstract adapter class for receiving misdesign events. The methods in this class are empty. This class exists as convenience for creating listener objects. See MisdesignListener
Author:
Belegkarnil
